{{Infobox artifact
| name = Suriel's glass bead
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Suriel's glass bead Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel]]'s glass bead, also known as [[Suriel]]'s marble or [[Suriel]]'s glass marble, is a small, transparent orb roughly the size of a thumbnail. It contains a single blue candle-flame that burns steadily at its center, with the flame always pointing upward regardless of how the object is turned. The bead is warm to the touch and emits a bright, sapphire light that can shine like a tiny star. Given to [[Lindon]] by the Sixth [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]], [[Suriel]], the object serves as a token that allows her to locate him easily. Beyond its function as a tracking device, the marble provides significant emotional and spiritual comfort, acting as a symbol of hope and a reminder that he has not been abandoned. Spiritually, the bead radiates a sense of order, stability, and rightness, as if its flame adds something positive to the world. While it lacks practical utility beyond being a potential distraction, it has served as a source of determination and mental strength for [[Lindon]] during difficult times.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]] gave [[Lindon]] a glass bead with a blue flame that shines like a tiny star.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Suriel]]'s glass marble.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon's core]] became as big as [[Suriel]]’s marble after advancement.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Suriel]]'s glass marble is a smooth, round ball with a single blue candle-flame flickering in the center.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel]]'s marble is smooth and warm.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Suriel]]'s marble is warm, comforting to spiritual sense, and brings a sense of order.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] carries [[Suriel]]'s marble in his pocket.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Suriel]]'s marble provides a faint blue candle-glow.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Suriel]]'s marble will return to [[Lindon]] without fail.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is playing with [[Suriel]]'s marble.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] tried not to reach for [[Suriel]]’s marble.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses [[Suriel]]’s marble to [[steel]] himself.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"rolling its smooth, warm surface between his fingers."<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
